TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Romi'ad no yncuminco == Romi'ad no yincuminco o nano Conghuaminko piharatengan to pangangan to yincuminco saki pihamonan no niyah a romi'ad, romi'ad itini i 8 folad 1 romi'ad . Onini a romi'ad o nano Conghuaminko nitelekan a piharatengan a romi'ad. Piikoran Nai 1984 miheca Taywan yincuminco salongoc micikerohay to "yincuminco pangangan a onto". Onini a onto milongoc dengan pingitangit mifalic to i'yaway nano Conghuaminko a nipangangan "Santisanpow" sanay a patodong i, halo pipatikol to rocokan ngangan no tamdaw ato patikol to ngangan no niyaro' o sanay. Ikor tonini a onto itira i 1994 miheca 8 folad 1 romi'ad, pakayni i Komindaykay mifalic ta i kimpo ko patongal a mitelek o nano "Sanpaw" mifalic to "Yincumin" sato, Sincenyin piharatengan to pangangan to yincumin, itini i 2005 miheca 6 folad 15 romi'ad i kalomaoc no Sencenyin mihayda to "piharatengan ato kaacangang pidemakan a telekan" tateleken, miketon to mihecahecaan i 8 folad 1 romi'ad ko "Tincuminco romi'ad" piharatengan sato . Tadamaanay patodongan "Yincuminco" o niyah niketonan a pitahidang, caay ko tao ko pafeliay, no niyah nitelekan a ngangan, o niyah kalacecayan no finacadan ko patirengan, o pitireng to salongan to pingodo to niyah atom o^celay no syakay a patodong a harateng, ato pisawad to micingcingan pikowan a tomenekan harayeng. Orasaka pakayni "yincuminco" a pipangangan pa'icel ato kalalikidan no sa'ayaway no Taywan, pahapinang to yincuminco o nano tada tawki tamdaw no Taywan, ato katadamaan no yincuminco i Taywan . 'Ayaw no katatefing no Taywan yincuminco ato tayniay a tamdaw i, dotoc sa to pakoniyahay a lekakawa ato sarikec, to ka'oripan a sofal midemak to sakirikec mikowan, roma a sowal, o yincuminco ira ko todong a iraay ko no niyah pikowan a sakirocok to sofal, onini a niyah pikowan pahapinang i ka'oripan a sofal no tamdawan, demakan, lalosidan a kapolongan, ma'osiay, caayay kacitodongan roma rikec pikowan a 'icel. Pahapinang no Taywan a patenokan, o cecay a ponka no Taywan ko Conghua ponka, patapal to polong finawlan no Taywan, saka ira miraayay likisi no Taywan, 'ayaw no 6000 mihecaan, yincuminco o iraay to itini i Taywan, macowat ko masamaamaanay tadamaanay a ponka, nanay o finawlan no kitakit o mingodoay masasiraoyay to nga'ayay ponka no yincuminco . Pili'ay a lalowadan I 2016 miheca 8 folad 1 romi'ad, Conghuaminko sifo pasi yincuminco ko pili'ay a lalowadan itini i ka'ayaw no congtongfo cingko rawang midemak. Mili'ayay o Conghuaminko sifo, midayhiw ci Tsai Ing-wen, o dayhiw no yincumin o kakeridan mifelihay no heneng a Tao finacadan ci Capen Nganaen ko milayapay . Mikihatiyaay ira ko Conghuaminko sifo: Micokeray to congtong ci Chen Jianren, Sincenyin kakeridan ci Lin Quan, Hoyin kakeridan ci Lai Haomin, Pilifetanyin kakeridan ci Wu Jinlin, Kantokyin kakeridan ci Zhang Boya, Kantokyin kakeridan micokeray ci Sun Dachuan, Lifayin mitiliday ci Lin Zhijia, Cinmintang kakeridan ci James Soong, Setayliliang kakeridan ci Huang Guochang, Mincintang mitiliday ci Hong Yaofu, Congtongfo micokeray mitiliday ci Liu Jianxin, Zeng Houren Taywan yincuminco: kasafinacadan dayhiw Roma kitakit a dayhiw: kasakitakit Tuvalu nipatatekoan dayhiw 11 kitakit itiniay Taywan ato dayhiw Kasakamok Taywan yincuminco pangangan a onto Congtongfo yincuminco likisi mo^cel ato paliyol pamo^cel wuyinhuy Kitakit pili'ayan romi'ad Canada polong kitakit yincumin romi'ad Pinengnengan to tilid 2. 2018-03-08).
S.PHON: == ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ no~u jnʦo~u~uminʦo~u == ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ no~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u o~u nano~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u piħaratəŋan to~u paŋaŋan to~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u saki piħamo~unan no~u nijaħ a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ itini i * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ . o~unini a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ o~u nano~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u nitəɾəkan a piħaratəŋan a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ. piiko~uran nai **** miħəʦa tajwan jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u saɾo~uŋo~uʦ miʦikəro~uħaj to~u "jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u paŋaŋan a o~unto~u". o~unini a o~unto~u miɾo~uŋo~uʦ ɬ~ɮəŋan piŋitaŋit mifaɾiʦ to~u iʡjawaj nano~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u a nipaŋaŋan "santisanpo~uw" sanaj a pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ i, ħaɾo~u pipatiko~uɾ to~u ro~uʦo~ukan ŋaŋan no~u tamɬ~ɮaw ato~u patiko~uɾ to~u ŋaŋan no~u nijaro~uʡ o~u sanaj. iko~ur to~unini a o~unto~u itira i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, pakajni i ko~uminɬ~ɮajkaj mifaɾiʦ ta i kimpo~u ko~u pato~uŋaɾ a mitəɾək o~u nano~u "sanpaw" mifaɾiʦ to~u "jinʦo~u~umin" sato~u, sinʦənjin piħaratəŋan to~u paŋaŋan to~u jinʦo~u~umin, itini i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ i kaɾo~umao~uʦ no~u sənʦənjin miħajɬ~ɮa to~u "piħaratəŋan ato~u kaaʦaŋaŋ piɬ~ɮəmakan a təɾəkan" tatəɾəkən, mikəto~un to~u miħəʦaħəʦaan i * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ko~u "tinʦo~u~uminʦo~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ" piħaratəŋan sato~u . taɬ~ɮamaanaj pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋan "jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u" o~u nijaħ nikəto~unan a pitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ, ʦaaj ko~u tao~u ko~u pafəɾiaj, no~u nijaħ nitəɾəkan a ŋaŋan, o~u nijaħ kaɾaʦəʦajan no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan ko~u patirəŋan, o~u pitirəŋ to~u saɾo~uŋan to~u piŋo~uɬ~ɮo~u to~u nijaħ ato~um o~uʔʦəɾaj no~u sjakaj a pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ a ħaratəŋ, ato~u pisawaɬ~ɮ to~u miʦiŋʦiŋan piko~uwan a to~umənəkan ħarajəŋ. o~urasaka pakajni "jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u" a pipaŋaŋan paʡiʦəɾ ato~u kaɾaɾikiɬ~ɮan no~u saʡajawaj no~u tajwan, paħapinaŋ to~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u o~u nano~u taɬ~ɮa tawki tamɬ~ɮaw no~u tajwan, ato~u kataɬ~ɮamaan no~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u i tajwan . ʡajaw no~u katatəfiŋ no~u tajwan jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u ato~u tajniaj a tamɬ~ɮaw i, ɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ sa to~u pako~unijaħaj a ɾəkakawa ato~u sarikəʦ, to~u kaʡo~uripan a so~ufaɾ miɬ~ɮəmak to~u sakirikəʦ miko~uwan, ro~uma a so~uwaɾ, o~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u ira ko~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ a iraaj ko~u no~u nijaħ piko~uwan a sakiro~uʦo~uk to~u so~ufaɾ, o~unini a nijaħ piko~uwan paħapinaŋ i kaʡo~uripan a so~ufaɾ no~u tamɬ~ɮawan, ɬ~ɮəmakan, ɾaɾo~usiɬ~ɮan a kapo~uɾo~uŋan, maʡo~usiaj, ʦaajaj kaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋan ro~uma rikəʦ piko~uwan a ʡiʦəɾ. paħapinaŋ no~u tajwan a patəno~ukan, o~u ʦəʦaj a po~unka no~u tajwan ko~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~ua po~unka, patapaɾ to~u po~uɾo~uŋ finawɾan no~u tajwan, saka ira miraajaj ɾikisi no~u tajwan, ʡajaw no~u **** miħəʦaan, jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u o~u iraaj to~u itini i tajwan, maʦo~uwat ko~u masamaamaanaj taɬ~ɮamaanaj a po~unka, nanaj o~u finawɾan no~u kitakit o~u miŋo~uɬ~ɮo~uaj masasirao~ujaj to~u ŋaʡajaj po~unka no~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u . piɾiʡaj a ɾaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮan i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u sifo~u pasi jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u ko~u piɾiʡaj a ɾaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮan itini i kaʡajaw no~u ʦo~uŋto~uŋfo~u ʦiŋko~u rawaŋ miɬ~ɮəmak. miɾiʡajaj o~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u sifo~u, miɬ~ɮajħiw ʦi tsai iŋ-wən, o~u ɬ~ɮajħiw no~u jinʦo~u~umin o~u kakəriɬ~ɮan mifəɾiħaj no~u ħənəŋ a tao~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan ʦi ʦapən ŋanaən ko~u miɾajapaj . mikiħatijaaj ira ko~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u sifo~u: miʦo~ukəraj to~u ʦo~uŋto~uŋ ʦi ʦħən *ianrən, sinʦənjin kakəriɬ~ɮan ʦi ɾin *o~u~uan, ħo~ujin kakəriɬ~ɮan ʦi ɾai ħao~umin, piɾifətanjin kakəriɬ~ɮan ʦi wo~u~u *inɾin, kanto~ukjin kakəriɬ~ɮan ʦi *ħaŋ b~b~vo~uja, kanto~ukjin kakəriɬ~ɮan miʦo~ukəraj ʦi so~u~un ɬ~ɮaʦħo~u~uan, ɾifajin mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj ʦi ɾin *ħijia, ʦinmintaŋ kakəriɬ~ɮan ʦi *aməs so~uo~uŋ, sətajɾiɾiaŋ kakəriɬ~ɮan ʦi ħo~u~uaŋ *o~u~uo~uʦħaŋ, minʦintaŋ mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj ʦi ħo~uŋ jao~ufo~u~u, ʦo~uŋto~uŋfo~u miʦo~ukəraj mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj ʦi ɾio~u~u *ianxin, *əŋ ħo~uo~u~urən tajwan jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u: kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan ɬ~ɮajħiw ro~uma kitakit a ɬ~ɮajħiw: kasakitakit to~u~ub~vaɾo~u~u nipatatəko~uan ɬ~ɮajħiw ** kitakit itiniaj tajwan ato~u ɬ~ɮajħiw kasakamo~uk tajwan jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u paŋaŋan a o~unto~u ʦo~uŋto~uŋfo~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u ɾikisi mo~uʔʦəɾ ato~u paɾijo~uɾ pamo~uʔʦəɾ wo~u~ujinħo~u~uj kitakit piɾiʡajan ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ʦanaɬ~ɮa po~uɾo~uŋ kitakit jinʦo~u~umin ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ pinəŋnəŋan to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ *. ****-**-**).
S.FORM: == Romi'ad no yncuminco == Romi'ad no yincuminco o nano Conghuaminko piharatengan to pangangan to yincuminco saki pihamonan no niyah a romi'ad, romi'ad itini i 8 folad 1 romi'ad . Onini a romi'ad o nano Conghuaminko nitelekan a piharatengan a romi'ad. Piikoran Nai 1984 miheca Taywan yincuminco salongoc micikerohay to "yincuminco pangangan a onto". Onini a onto milongoc dengan pingitangit mifalic to i'yaway nano Conghuaminko a nipangangan "Santisanpow" sanay a patodong i, halo pipatikol to rocokan ngangan no tamdaw ato patikol to ngangan no niyaro' o sanay. Ikor tonini a onto itira i 1994 miheca 8 folad 1 romi'ad, pakayni i Komindaykay mifalic ta i kimpo ko patongal a mitelek o nano "Sanpaw" mifalic to "Yincumin" sato, Sincenyin piharatengan to pangangan to yincumin, itini i 2005 miheca 6 folad 15 romi'ad i kalomaoc no Sencenyin mihayda to "piharatengan ato kaacangang pidemakan a telekan" tateleken, miketon to mihecahecaan i 8 folad 1 romi'ad ko "Tincuminco romi'ad" piharatengan sato . Tadamaanay patodongan "Yincuminco" o niyah niketonan a pitahidang, caay ko tao ko pafeliay, no niyah nitelekan a ngangan, o niyah kalacecayan no finacadan ko patirengan, o pitireng to salongan to pingodo to niyah atom o^celay no syakay a patodong a harateng, ato pisawad to micingcingan pikowan a tomenekan harayeng. Orasaka pakayni "yincuminco" a pipangangan pa'icel ato kalalikidan no sa'ayaway no Taywan, pahapinang to yincuminco o nano tada tawki tamdaw no Taywan, ato katadamaan no yincuminco i Taywan . 'Ayaw no katatefing no Taywan yincuminco ato tayniay a tamdaw i, dotoc sa to pakoniyahay a lekakawa ato sarikec, to ka'oripan a sofal midemak to sakirikec mikowan, roma a sowal, o yincuminco ira ko todong a iraay ko no niyah pikowan a sakirocok to sofal, onini a niyah pikowan pahapinang i ka'oripan a sofal no tamdawan, demakan, lalosidan a kapolongan, ma'osiay, caayay kacitodongan roma rikec pikowan a 'icel. Pahapinang no Taywan a patenokan, o cecay a ponka no Taywan ko Conghua ponka, patapal to polong finawlan no Taywan, saka ira miraayay likisi no Taywan, 'ayaw no 6000 mihecaan, yincuminco o iraay to itini i Taywan, macowat ko masamaamaanay tadamaanay a ponka, nanay o finawlan no kitakit o mingodoay masasiraoyay to nga'ayay ponka no yincuminco . Pili'ay a lalowadan I 2016 miheca 8 folad 1 romi'ad, Conghuaminko sifo pasi yincuminco ko pili'ay a lalowadan itini i ka'ayaw no congtongfo cingko rawang midemak. Mili'ayay o Conghuaminko sifo, midayhiw ci Tsai Ing-wen, o dayhiw no yincumin o kakeridan mifelihay no heneng a Tao finacadan ci Capen Nganaen ko milayapay . Mikihatiyaay ira ko Conghuaminko sifo: Micokeray to congtong ci Chen Jianren, Sincenyin kakeridan ci Lin Quan, Hoyin kakeridan ci Lai Haomin, Pilifetanyin kakeridan ci Wu Jinlin, Kantokyin kakeridan ci Zhang Boya, Kantokyin kakeridan micokeray ci Sun Dachuan, Lifayin mitiliday ci Lin Zhijia, Cinmintang kakeridan ci James Soong, Setayliliang kakeridan ci Huang Guochang, Mincintang mitiliday ci Hong Yaofu, Congtongfo micokeray mitiliday ci Liu Jianxin, Zeng Houren Taywan yincuminco: kasafinacadan dayhiw Roma kitakit a dayhiw: kasakitakit Tuvalu nipatatekoan dayhiw 11 kitakit itiniay Taywan ato dayhiw Kasakamok Taywan yincuminco pangangan a onto Congtongfo yincuminco likisi mo^cel ato paliyol pamo^cel wuyinhuy Kitakit pili'ayan romi'ad Canada polong kitakit yincumin romi'ad Pinengnengan to tilid 2. 2018-03-08).
S.PHON: == ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ no~u jnʦo~u~uminʦo~u == ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ no~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u o~u nano~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u piħaratəŋan to~u paŋaŋan to~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u saki piħamo~unan no~u nijaħ a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ itini i * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ . o~unini a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ o~u nano~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u nitəɾəkan a piħaratəŋan a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ. piiko~uran nai **** miħəʦa tajwan jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u saɾo~uŋo~uʦ miʦikəro~uħaj to~u "jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u paŋaŋan a o~unto~u". o~unini a o~unto~u miɾo~uŋo~uʦ ɬ~ɮəŋan piŋitaŋit mifaɾiʦ to~u iʡjawaj nano~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u a nipaŋaŋan "santisanpo~uw" sanaj a pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ i, ħaɾo~u pipatiko~uɾ to~u ro~uʦo~ukan ŋaŋan no~u tamɬ~ɮaw ato~u patiko~uɾ to~u ŋaŋan no~u nijaro~uʡ o~u sanaj. iko~ur to~unini a o~unto~u itira i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, pakajni i ko~uminɬ~ɮajkaj mifaɾiʦ ta i kimpo~u ko~u pato~uŋaɾ a mitəɾək o~u nano~u "sanpaw" mifaɾiʦ to~u "jinʦo~u~umin" sato~u, sinʦənjin piħaratəŋan to~u paŋaŋan to~u jinʦo~u~umin, itini i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ i kaɾo~umao~uʦ no~u sənʦənjin miħajɬ~ɮa to~u "piħaratəŋan ato~u kaaʦaŋaŋ piɬ~ɮəmakan a təɾəkan" tatəɾəkən, mikəto~un to~u miħəʦaħəʦaan i * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ko~u "tinʦo~u~uminʦo~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ" piħaratəŋan sato~u . taɬ~ɮamaanaj pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋan "jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u" o~u nijaħ nikəto~unan a pitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ, ʦaaj ko~u tao~u ko~u pafəɾiaj, no~u nijaħ nitəɾəkan a ŋaŋan, o~u nijaħ kaɾaʦəʦajan no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan ko~u patirəŋan, o~u pitirəŋ to~u saɾo~uŋan to~u piŋo~uɬ~ɮo~u to~u nijaħ ato~um o~uʔʦəɾaj no~u sjakaj a pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ a ħaratəŋ, ato~u pisawaɬ~ɮ to~u miʦiŋʦiŋan piko~uwan a to~umənəkan ħarajəŋ. o~urasaka pakajni "jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u" a pipaŋaŋan paʡiʦəɾ ato~u kaɾaɾikiɬ~ɮan no~u saʡajawaj no~u tajwan, paħapinaŋ to~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u o~u nano~u taɬ~ɮa tawki tamɬ~ɮaw no~u tajwan, ato~u kataɬ~ɮamaan no~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u i tajwan . ʡajaw no~u katatəfiŋ no~u tajwan jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u ato~u tajniaj a tamɬ~ɮaw i, ɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ sa to~u pako~unijaħaj a ɾəkakawa ato~u sarikəʦ, to~u kaʡo~uripan a so~ufaɾ miɬ~ɮəmak to~u sakirikəʦ miko~uwan, ro~uma a so~uwaɾ, o~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u ira ko~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ a iraaj ko~u no~u nijaħ piko~uwan a sakiro~uʦo~uk to~u so~ufaɾ, o~unini a nijaħ piko~uwan paħapinaŋ i kaʡo~uripan a so~ufaɾ no~u tamɬ~ɮawan, ɬ~ɮəmakan, ɾaɾo~usiɬ~ɮan a kapo~uɾo~uŋan, maʡo~usiaj, ʦaajaj kaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋan ro~uma rikəʦ piko~uwan a ʡiʦəɾ. paħapinaŋ no~u tajwan a patəno~ukan, o~u ʦəʦaj a po~unka no~u tajwan ko~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~ua po~unka, patapaɾ to~u po~uɾo~uŋ finawɾan no~u tajwan, saka ira miraajaj ɾikisi no~u tajwan, ʡajaw no~u **** miħəʦaan, jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u o~u iraaj to~u itini i tajwan, maʦo~uwat ko~u masamaamaanaj taɬ~ɮamaanaj a po~unka, nanaj o~u finawɾan no~u kitakit o~u miŋo~uɬ~ɮo~uaj masasirao~ujaj to~u ŋaʡajaj po~unka no~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u . piɾiʡaj a ɾaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮan i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u sifo~u pasi jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u ko~u piɾiʡaj a ɾaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮan itini i kaʡajaw no~u ʦo~uŋto~uŋfo~u ʦiŋko~u rawaŋ miɬ~ɮəmak. miɾiʡajaj o~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u sifo~u, miɬ~ɮajħiw ʦi tsai iŋ-wən, o~u ɬ~ɮajħiw no~u jinʦo~u~umin o~u kakəriɬ~ɮan mifəɾiħaj no~u ħənəŋ a tao~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan ʦi ʦapən ŋanaən ko~u miɾajapaj . mikiħatijaaj ira ko~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u sifo~u: miʦo~ukəraj to~u ʦo~uŋto~uŋ ʦi ʦħən *ianrən, sinʦənjin kakəriɬ~ɮan ʦi ɾin *o~u~uan, ħo~ujin kakəriɬ~ɮan ʦi ɾai ħao~umin, piɾifətanjin kakəriɬ~ɮan ʦi wo~u~u *inɾin, kanto~ukjin kakəriɬ~ɮan ʦi *ħaŋ b~b~vo~uja, kanto~ukjin kakəriɬ~ɮan miʦo~ukəraj ʦi so~u~un ɬ~ɮaʦħo~u~uan, ɾifajin mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj ʦi ɾin *ħijia, ʦinmintaŋ kakəriɬ~ɮan ʦi *aməs so~uo~uŋ, sətajɾiɾiaŋ kakəriɬ~ɮan ʦi ħo~u~uaŋ *o~u~uo~uʦħaŋ, minʦintaŋ mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj ʦi ħo~uŋ jao~ufo~u~u, ʦo~uŋto~uŋfo~u miʦo~ukəraj mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj ʦi ɾio~u~u *ianxin, *əŋ ħo~uo~u~urən tajwan jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u: kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan ɬ~ɮajħiw ro~uma kitakit a ɬ~ɮajħiw: kasakitakit to~u~ub~vaɾo~u~u nipatatəko~uan ɬ~ɮajħiw ** kitakit itiniaj tajwan ato~u ɬ~ɮajħiw kasakamo~uk tajwan jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u paŋaŋan a o~unto~u ʦo~uŋto~uŋfo~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u ɾikisi mo~uʔʦəɾ ato~u paɾijo~uɾ pamo~uʔʦəɾ wo~u~ujinħo~u~uj kitakit piɾiʡajan ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ʦanaɬ~ɮa po~uɾo~uŋ kitakit jinʦo~u~umin ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ pinəŋnəŋan to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ *. ****-**-**).
